transition: 兌 Duì (Joyous Lake) -> 無妄 Wú Wàng (Innocence)
verse_zh: 結網得解，受福安坐，終无患禍。
verse_en: The knotted net finds release; one receives blessing and sits at ease. In the end there is no trouble or calamity.
note: Latches onto the stray word 'net' and inverts the meaning (verse is about release/ease).
prompt: The knotted net finds release; one receives blessing and sits at ease. In the end there is no trouble or calamity. Chinese ink painting style.
